return(function(y,m,c,q,D,L,b,x,O,T,o,K,U,r,J,k,Q,a,N,n,S,V)N,x,n,O,r,J,k,V,K,Q,T,a,U,o,S=function(y,G)local m=k(G)local c=function(c,q)return x(y,{c;q},G,m)end return c end,function(x,c,q,D)local
